headline: Days after President Trump celebrated ousting incumbent Sen. Bill Cassidy in Louisiana’s GOP primary, Cassidy voted in favor of advancing a resolution that would limit Trump’s ability to wage war in Iran without congressional approval

A Georgia congressman and a former college football coach will meet in a runoff next month after neither captured 50% of the vote in the GOP Senate primary Tuesday to challenge Democrat Jon Ossoff for his Senate seat
President Trump’s handpicked House candidate defeated longtime GOP antagonist Rep. Thomas Massie of Kentucky, underscoring the president’s iron grip on the Republican Party
Hilton and Becerra lead in a tightening race in final weeks of California governor's campaign, poll shows
Ebola outbreak may be spreading faster than first thought, WHO doctor warns
Son of Mango Fashion Chain’s Founder Is Arrested as Suspect in His Death
